headline: Wolfe Research upgrades AvalonBay, Equity Residential on merger synergy and value
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research upgraded apartment REITs AvalonBay Communities and Equity Residential to Outperform from Peer Perform, arguing that expected merger synergies and attractive valuations outweigh a still-challenging but stabilizing operating environment.

headline: This Craig-Hallum Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Monday
summary: Analysts downgraded ratings on Cardiff Oncology, Crescent Biopharma, Corsair Gaming, Equity Residential and Caesars Entertainment.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Downgrades Equity Residential to In-Line, Maintains Price Target to $70
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   downgrades Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Outperform to In-Line and maintains the price target from $70 to $70.
